## What

Brief 1-2 sentence summary of the change.

## Why

Motivation for this change. What problem does it solve or what capability does it add?

## How

Approach taken. Key files modified or created, implementation strategy, any breaking changes.

## Type of change

- [ ] New agent
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] New rule
- [ ] New hook
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] Validators pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] Tested install with `./install.sh --dry-run`
- [ ] No hardcoded absolute paths
- [ ] Conventional commit message format
- [ ] No new external dependencies introduced
